sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84091" key="pno/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πνόος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n84091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πνοή</ref></xr>, Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πνυκίτης</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυκνίτης.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
